raw_consumer_statement: I was fraudulently charged for a {$1.00} in XX/XX/XXXX. Citi Bank immediately notified me and closed my card. 10 days later, on XX/XX/XXXX, the same merchant charged my new card before I had even received it. I immediately contacted Citi the same day and reported this as fraud. They closed this new card and then ordered me a new card. This charge has since posted to my newest account with the same XX/XX/XXXX date and it is already XX/XX/XXXX and I have not had this dispute resolved nor have I receive a provisional credit by the 10th day.
